journal_entry.description: Discounting of 90-day non-interest-bearing promissory note at bank
journal_entry.rationale: Ford discounted a $100,000 face value note with 40 days remaining at 15% annual discount rate. Discount = $100,000 × 0.15 × (40/365) = $1,643.84. Net proceeds = $100,000 - $1,643.84 = $98,356.16. Since IFRS 9 derecognition criteria are met, the note receivable is removed and the discount is recorded as a financing expense (loss on discounting).

output_debit_classifier.reason: Note discounting with derecognition: Cash increases (asset↑), Loss on discounting increases (expense↑), Notes Receivable decreases (asset↓). Discount calculation: $100,000 × 15% × (40 days remaining/365) = $1,643.84
